title: praealstonia rufescens
intro: Praealstonia rufescens, also known as the Red-stemmed Alstonia, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Asia. The medicinal properties of Praealstonia rufescens are attributed to the presence of alkaloids and glycosides, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce anxiety, and act as an anticonvulsant. Praealstonia rufescens can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal purposes, although its effectiveness and safety should be further studied.
